case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ADELAIDA C. RAMOS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, DONNA FLORES ALBERTO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ADELAIDA C. RAMOS. PROOF OF SERVCIE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $603.77 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, ADELAIDA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED MAY-28-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, ADELAIDA C.
